title: Edit Activity Icons in CRM
excerpt:
Looking to edit the activity icons - to associate same actions with different teams by color. 
Option appears to add new activity but not edit existing.   or allow to vary across CRM boards.

posts.author: Webby0242 (Yvonne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to edit the activity icons - to associate same actions with different teams by color.
Option appears to add new activity but not edit existing. or allow to vary across CRM boards.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s not a feature as it stands currently. You might put it here as a request? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
